title: デビュー戦の後に・Der Anfang

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash makes her debut without a hitch, but
she seems concerned about something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With so many of her contemporaries being
standouts, she'll have to approach the Keisei Hai
with care for any hope of success in the Classic
Triple Crown.
